project_summary: An AI-powered platform that analyzes football player performance from mobile-recorded videos. It extracts movement data, evaluates skills such as speed, agility, and decision-making, and connects players with clubs, scouts, and agents worldwide. The platform features player profiles, market value estimation, and detailed performance reports.
strengths: Addresses a real need for talent discovery and evaluation in football.
Leverages AI to automate and standardize player assessment.
Accessible via mobile devices, increasing user reach.
Creates a global network connecting players, scouts, and clubs.
Provides valuable data-driven insights for both players and recruiters.
risks: Technical challenges in accurately analyzing video from diverse mobile devices.
Potential privacy and data security concerns with user-uploaded videos.
Difficulty in gaining trust and adoption from established clubs and scouts.
High competition from existing sports analytics and recruitment platforms.
Possible legal and regulatory issues regarding minors and international data transfer.
improvements: Develop partnerships with football academies and clubs for early adoption.
Implement robust data privacy and security measures.
Offer educational resources to help users record high-quality videos.
Integrate feedback loops for scouts and clubs to improve AI accuracy.
Expand to other sports or add features like injury risk assessment.
monetization_potential: High, through subscription fees for advanced analytics, premium player profiles, commissions on successful player placements, advertising, and partnerships with clubs and agencies.
